args.query: what is the default host port for the NATS monitor in docker compose

questions.why: README Configuration (~15.5KB in) gives the default 8222; README Quick Start (~1.8KB in) gives 28222 as the port-conflict workaround. Same env var, different values, 13.7KB apart. Strongest polarity in the set: the DISTRACTOR sits inside the old 8000-char embedding window and the ANSWER sits past it, so whole-file retrieval is pulled toward the wrong one. A whole-file top node carries both and cannot answer.

args.query: what port does the seminstruct inference container publish

questions.why: configs/tiers/README.md runs semembed on 8081 (Tier 1, ~4.2KB in) and seminstruct on 8083 (Tier 2, ~7.3KB in) via near-identical `docker run -d -p NNNN:NNNN ghcr.io/c360studio/... # OpenAI-compatible ...` lines differing only in the digit and the service, 42 lines / ~3.1KB apart in an 8257 B file. The tighter-separated of the two, so it covers a shorter-range confusion than X01. NOTE: it was expected to be ceiling-sensitive and is NOT — TestBoundsSweep shows both literals separate at every ceiling from 1000 to 6000, because the two commands sit under different headings and section structure splits before size does. Verified by check-discrimination.py.
